notes: Seasonal events roll at the END of every season and take effect the NEXT season. They appear in the Season Summary as 'NEXT SEASON NEWS'. Kinds: modifier (passive multiplier effect each active season — shown in left panel), mandate (requirement you must meet each season or pay a fine), contract (hit a target within a time window for a reward; penalty if window closes unmet), instant (one-time effect fires at start of next season). Offerable contracts (is_offerable: true) appear on the offers board to accept voluntarily.

events.name: Global Pandemic
events.desc: NEXT SEASON NEWS: Everyone's home watching TV. All shows get +12% views — but production costs skyrocket. Upkeep on all live shows increases by x1.35 for 2 seasons.

events.name: Ad Market Surge
events.desc: NEXT SEASON NEWS: Brands are spending heavily. Every live show earns +$6 flat income per season for 2 seasons. Stacks with ad revenue and star income.

events.name: Budget Audit
events.desc: NEXT SEASON NEWS: The board dispatched accountants. All live show upkeep multiplied by x1.50 for 2 seasons — every dollar of upkeep costs 50% more than usual.

events.name: Tech Sector Ad Blitz
events.desc: NEXT SEASON NEWS: Every startup is buying airtime. All shows get +$5 flat income per season. Sci-Fi shows get an additional +10% views; News shows get an additional +8% views for 2 seasons.

events.name: Streaming Wars
events.desc: NEXT SEASON NEWS: Rival platforms are poaching viewers. Everyone's cord-cutting. All live shows take a -15% views penalty (x0.85) for 2 seasons. Vault shows are unaffected.

events.name: Summer Ratings Slump
events.desc: NEXT SEASON NEWS: Audiences are outdoors. All live shows take a -12% views penalty (x0.88) for 2 seasons. Views still count toward your quota — plan carefully.

events.name: Production Strike
events.desc: NEXT SEASON NEWS: Set workers walked out. All live show upkeep multiplied by x1.60 for 3 seasons — the longest and harshest upkeep penalty in the game. Views are unaffected.

events.name: Television Golden Age
events.desc: NEXT SEASON NEWS: Critics and audiences have rediscovered appointment TV. All live shows get +10% views (x1.10) for 2 seasons. One of the rare purely positive view modifiers.

events.name: National Food Obsession
events.desc: NEXT SEASON NEWS: Everyone's a home chef now. Cooking shows are the talk of the nation. Cooking shows get +20% views; Reality shows get +8% views for the duration.

events.name: Awards Season Buzz
events.desc: NEXT SEASON NEWS: Your network is in the running. Critics are paying attention and audiences followed. All shows get a modest +12% views boost for 2 seasons.

events.name: Cord-Cutting Reversal
events.desc: NEXT SEASON NEWS: Streaming fatigue has set in. Viewers are returning to live broadcast TV. All shows get +10% views and income rises by +$4 per show this season.

events.name: Sports Rights Frenzy
events.desc: NEXT SEASON NEWS: Live sports rights are at an all-time premium. Sports shows get +25% views; Drama and News also benefit with a small +8% views lift.

events.name: Nostalgia Wave
events.desc: NEXT SEASON NEWS: Audiences are craving classic comfort TV. Sitcoms and Drama are spiking. Sitcoms get +18% views; Drama gets +12% views for 2 seasons.

events.name: Ad Revenue Windfall
events.desc: NEXT SEASON NEWS: A major advertiser entered the market and is spending aggressively. Every show earns +$8 income this season and next from the ad surplus.

events.name: Sci-Fi Renaissance
events.desc: NEXT SEASON NEWS: A blockbuster franchise reignited public appetite for Sci-Fi. Sci-Fi shows get +22% views this season. Reality and News also pick up minor interest (+6%).

events.name: Writers' Strike
events.desc: NEXT SEASON NEWS [MANDATE]: Script supply has collapsed. You MUST air at least 2 Reality shows each season this mandate is active. Fail each season and pay a -$20 budget fine. Checked at the START of every season.

events.name: Public Interest Directive
events.desc: NEXT SEASON NEWS [MANDATE]: Regulators are watching. You MUST air at least 1 News show each season for 3 seasons. Fail each season: -$15 budget fine. Checked at the START of every season.

events.name: Prime Time Commitment
events.desc: NEXT SEASON NEWS [MANDATE]: Advertisers are paying a premium for Prime Time (slot 3). You MUST keep Prime Time filled each season. Fail each season: -$12 budget fine. Checked at the START of every season.

events.name: Talent Showcase Deal
events.desc: NEXT SEASON NEWS [MANDATE]: Your agent lined up a deal. You MUST keep at least 3 stars attached across your lineup each season. Fail each season: -$18 budget fine. Stars in vault shows count. Checked at the START of every season.

events.name: Clip Goes Viral
events.desc: NEXT SEASON NEWS [INSTANT]: Something from your network exploded online. At the START of next season you gain +150 lifetime views. Views count toward your quota milestone.

events.name: Emergency Arts Council Grant
events.desc: NEXT SEASON NEWS [INSTANT]: The government funded an emergency arts initiative. At the START of next season your budget receives +$20. Helps when you're short on funds.

events.name: Industry Convention Buzz
events.desc: NEXT SEASON NEWS [INSTANT]: Your network was the talk of the trade show. At the START of next season: +120 lifetime views AND +$15 budget. A double bonus.

events.name: Creative Reinvention
events.desc: NEXT SEASON NEWS [INSTANT]: A cultural moment breathes new life into your shows. At the START of next season all scheduled shows lose 1 age point (minimum age 1). Lower age = higher views multiplier.
